documentation.file_docstring: Relay abort without forwarding the Event argument as the abort reason. Using .bind() avoids closure scope capture (memory leak prevention).
inline_comments: Fetch wrapper that adds timeout support via AbortController. @param url - The URL to fetch @param init - RequestInit options (headers, method, body, etc.) @param timeoutMs - Timeout in milliseconds @param fetchFn - The fetch implementation to use (defaults to global fetch) @returns The fetch Response @throws AbortError if the request times out
